title: South Korea's stock market rout isn't a vote against the country, market exchange chief says
summary_full: "This is a rebalancing exercise, and has nothing to do with any loss of conviction in the Korean market," Korea Exchange CEO Jeong Eun-bo said.
summary_public: "This is a rebalancing exercise, and has nothing to do with any loss of conviction in the Korean market," Korea Exchange CEO Jeong Eun-bo said.
